body:
This allows to avoid having to do something like this
```julia
# No fluxes
struct ZeroFluxes{N, B}
    solver_stop_criteria :: N
    bulk_velocity :: B
end

import ClimaOcean.OceanSeaIceModels.InterfaceComputations: compute_interface_state
using ClimaOcean.OceanSeaIceModels.InterfaceComputations: zero_interface_state

@inline compute_interface_state(::ZeroFluxes, args...) = zero_interface_state(Float64)
```
where we need to add a `bulk_velocity` to the flux formulation even if it does not necessarily need it.
I will open a new PR for cleaning up the `solver_stop_criteria`
title: Add `velocity_formulation` to the interface properties
